error.signature: COPY failed: file not found — Dockerfile COPY with spaces in path
error.regex: COPY failed.*file not found|ADD.*failed.*space|COPY.*no such file.*space

verdict.summary: Dockerfile COPY instruction fails when source or destination path contains spaces without proper quoting.

dead_ends.action: Escape spaces with backslash in COPY instruction
dead_ends.why_fails: Backslash escaping is inconsistent across Docker versions and platforms

dead_ends.action: Use shell glob to match the file with spaces
dead_ends.why_fails: COPY does not expand shell globs the same way; glob matching is for ADD with URLs only

workarounds.action: Use JSON array form for COPY with paths containing spaces
workarounds.how: COPY ["src/my file.txt", "/app/my file.txt"]  # JSON array form handles spaces correctly

workarounds.action: Rename files to remove spaces before COPY, or use .dockerignore and a staging step
workarounds.how: RUN mv '/app/my file.txt' /app/my_file.txt  # normalize after copy
